codeReview.summary: Current HEAD resolves the prior scrutiny failures for this feature. The original timeout masking in commit 6efb253 was superseded by later work, and current tests plus source now show a real request-scoped live-catalog dedupe path in `src/modules/onchain.ts` along with explicit coverage proving live-expanded onchain networks/dexes/pool data and seeded fallback behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: This feature's implementation history spanned multiple commits, but the handoff still pointed scrutiny at commit `6efb253`, which only contained provider fallback and a timeout bump. Shared state should more clearly require fix-review handoffs to identify the superseding commit(s) when current HEAD, rather than the original feature commit, is what resolves prior scrutiny failures.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `git show --stat 6efb253` only changes `src/providers/defillama.ts`, `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`, and `tests/defillama-provider.test.ts`, while `git blame -L 296,412 src/modules/onchain.ts` attributes the request-scoped `liveOnchainCatalogPromise` implementation to commit `3d5aa88e`, and current tests in `tests/app.test.ts:1849-2168` prove the live-expanded catalog behavior.

summary: Pass: the prior failures are resolved in current HEAD. Timeout masking has been replaced by a real live-catalog dedupe implementation, and tests now substantiate the live-expanded onchain network/dex/pool catalog behavior plus seeded fallback behavior.
